markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify content review processes and GrowthX's partnership model.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Medical Review:** A single-round medical review is mandatory for all content to build EEAT authority and ensure clinical accuracy. GrowthX agreed this model is viable.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [**Content Goal:** Scale from a current 5–8 articles/month to a consistent 50 articles/month by the end of Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Partnership Focus:** Jihan seeks a partner for strategic guidance, AI monitoring, and custom tools (e.g., quizzes, calculators), not just content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [**Next Meeting:** Scheduled for Dec 17 at 1 PM ET to review a refined competitive analysis (HERS, Alloy, Weight Watchers) and MIDI's specific SEO/GEO opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### MIDI's Content Strategy & Goals

  - [**Current State:** Publishing 5–8 articles/month; inconsistent cadence due to team capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Goal:** Scale to 50 articles/month by the end of Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To find the optimal content volume before diminishing returns.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [**Partnership Need:** Strategic guidance and AI monitoring for custom projects.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [**Content Preference:** Human-generated or heavily human-edited AI content to maintain a unique brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [**Requirement:** A single-round medical review is mandatory for all content.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Build EEAT authority for Google search and ensure clinical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [**Current Process:** Reviewers provide all feedback in one pass (1-hour effort, 1-week turnaround).](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Future State:** A dedicated reviewer could reduce turnaround to 1–2 days.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### GrowthX's Model & Capabilities

  - [**Content Creation:** Uses AI for initial drafts, followed by significant human editing to ensure quality.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Partnership Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint):** 8 weeks → 5–10 articles (closer to 5 for MIDI).](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing):** 5 articles/week (new or refreshed).](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Custom Workstreams:** Additional projects (quizzes, tools) cost $9k–$15k each.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**Client Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Evolved from blog content to programmatic tools and a separate brand hub ("Cashflow Desk") to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [**Webflow & Airbyte:** Use GrowthX for high-volume editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [Refine competitive analysis (HERS, Alloy, Weight Watchers) with Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
      - [Send MIDI case studies and ROI proof points.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Schedule Dec 17 meeting (Marcel, Jihan) for 1 PM ET.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**Jihan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Confirm availability for the Dec 17 meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoLSP4kDFudSgaDW7fKu2Y7HzNV4XhCc?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
